name: Spaetzle Cheese Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a frying pan and add the onions. Brown them lightly.
2. Toss the cheese with the dry mustard.
3. Add the cooked noodles to the onions and cheese; mix well.
4. Place the mixture in an ovenproof casserole dish.
5. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 30 minutes, or until hot and bubbly.
6. Sprinkle the chopped chives on top before serving.
